title: Sales Tax General Order # 08 of 2025 /IR Operations - Electronic Monitoring of Production by Counting Cotton Bales through Video Analytics
text:
-
13-
Government of Pakistan
Revenue Division
Federal Board of Revenue
Inland Revenue
**rrrrrr
F.No.6 ( 1 Tyrrs/r extitet2025 t t\7 S7 S'|'-, Islamabad, 20th November,2}25
Sales Tax General Order # 08 of 2025/ IR Operations
ELECTRONIC MONITORING OF PRODUCTION BY COUNTING COTTON BALES
THROUGH VIDEO ANALYTICS
In exercise of the powers conferred under Section 40C (2) of Sales Tax Act, 1990
and Rules I5OZQR and l50ZQT of the Chapter XIV-BA of the Sales Tax Rules,2006, The Federal
Board of Revenue is pleased to direct that all the registered persons engaged in textile spinning
shall install video analyics solution as specified under the rules with immediate effect.
2. It is hereby notified that the processing of cotton bales at all the textile spinning units shall
be monitored through video surveillance and video analytics solution, by installation of production
monitoring equipment at production lines/blendomats/auto-plucker machines, as provided by the
vendors approved by the Board.
3. All the registered persons engaged in textile spinning are hereby directed under law to
make necessary affangements for installation of video analytics solution (including hardware and
software) for successful implementation of electronic monitoring of production by 3 I't December,
2025.
4.
In order to ensure timely installation of the video analytics solution, the concerned Chief
Commissioners shall also notify dedicated focal persons who will work in liaison with the
registered persons engaged in textile spinning and authorized vendors for video analytics solution.
All field formations are hereby directed to prioritize the implementation process by focusing on
high-risk registered persons involved in textile spinning who are using undocumented cotton bales
(commonly known as "Gol Mall'). A non-exhaustive jurisdiction-wise list of registered persons
engaged in textile spinning is also enclosed. ,9

5.
Details of the vendors authorized under Chapter XIV-BA of Sales Tax Rules 2006, for
electronic monitoring of production of persons engaged in textile spinning through video analytics
are as notified as follows:
Company Name: ISSM Labelling Solutions Company Name: Obsidian Technologies
Contact Person: Haider Shafique Name: Naveed K. Latif
#:
PhoneAilhatsApp #: 0310-54 63614 PhoneAVhatsApp 03464333333
Email: haider.shafiq@issm.ai Email: naveed@obsidian.com.pk
6. All vendors authorized under Chapter XIV-BA of Sales Tax Rules 2006, for electronic
monitoring of production of persons engaged in textile spinning through video analytics are hereby
directed to ensure their video analytics solutions are compliant to the following criteria prescribed
under rule I5OZQT of Sales Tax Rules 2006.
(a) real time capture of production process;
(b) real time collection of data that shows production through object detection and
object counting;
(c) transmission of data to Central Control Unit at Board on real time basis, storage
and archiving of data;
(d) detection ofunexpected stops;
(e) quantitative analyses of productions; and
(f) data analytics for required legal actions.
7.
This issues with the approval of the competent authority, Member FBR,
Islamabad and shall be applicable with immediate effect.
Iq
